name: get_board_buses
short_description: Gets the list of board bus objects
full_help:
get_board_buses

Description: 
Gets the list of board bus objects

Syntax: 
get_board_buses  [-regexp] [-nocase] [-all] [-filter <arg>]
                 [-of_objects <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<patterns>...]

Returns: 
list of buses in the board

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-regexp]      Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]      Perform case-insensitive matching
  [-all]         Returns all enabled as well as disabled buses
  [-filter]      Filter list with expression
  [-of_objects]  Get 'board_bus' objects of these types: 'board 
                 board_component board_bus_net'.
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]   match board bus names against patterns
                 Default: *
                 Values: The default search pattern is the wildcard *, or .* 
                 when -regexp is specified.

Categories: 
Object, Board

arguments.description: Returns all enabled as well as disabled buses
